styles.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-900 leading-tight
styles.caption: text-sm text-slate-500 font-medium uppercase tracking-wider

buttons.primary: bg-[#0B4DBB] text-white hover:bg-[#093c96] shadow-lg shadow-blue-900/20 transition-all duration-300 px-8 py-3 font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#0B4DBB] border border-[#EEF2F7] hover:bg-[#F0F7FF] transition-all duration-300 px-8 py-3 font-medium
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-[#0B4DBB] hover:bg-blue-50 transition-colors px-4 py-2

cards.base: bg-white border border-[#EEF2F7] shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300 p-8
cards.feature: bg-white border border-[#EEF2F7] p-8 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-300 shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl hover:shadow-blue-900/5

inputs.base: border-[#EEF2F7] bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0B4DBB]/20 focus:border-[#0B4DBB] transition-all h-12

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all UI icons. Use simple, thin strokes (1.5px) for a premium feel.

instructions_to_main_agent: STRICTLY follow the Blue/White color palette. NO black backgrounds.
Use 'Inter' font for everything. Use 'tracking-tight' on headings to make them look premium.
Implement the 'Valuation Wizard' as a multi-step form using 'framer-motion' for smooth step transitions.
The Dashboard should look like a high-end financial terminal but simplified (think Stripe/Brex/Carta).
Use 'recharts' for all data visualization (Valuation charts, Exit scenarios).
Ensure the 'V' logo is present in the header. You can create a CSS-only version: a div with a gradient background and a clip-path or SVG.
For the 'Services' section on the landing page, use the 'feature' card style defined above.
Authentication is mocked, but build the UI for it (Login page).
Do NOT use gradients for text unless it's a very subtle brand moment. Keep text high-contrast.
Create a 'Layout' component that wraps pages and handles the Navbar and Footer.
universal_guidelines: Don't make generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry where possible.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
